title: From the high country to the coast, Australia’s ancient crustaceans are in trouble
description: From the alpine streams of Kosciuszko to the coastal creeks south of Batemans Bay, southern NSW is home to some of the most threatened freshwater animals on the planet. And the call is out to help protect them. Australia’s Spiny Crayfish – members of the Euastacus genus – have existed for millions of years, helping [...]

title: Ancient Brainstem Neurons Discovered to Control Attention
description: Selective spatial attention is controlled by an evolutionarily ancient circuit of inhibitory neurons in the brainstem.
